task_completion.description: Create the composite material layer sets for external walls and floor slabs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BlenderBIM (Bonsai) Material or Object Properties panel showing the creation of at least two new material layer sets (one for external walls, one for floor slabs).

task_completion.description: Define the individual material layers and their thicknesses within the layer sets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BlenderBIM material layer composition interface showing multiple distinct layers (up to 8 total) with specific material names and thickness values assigned to the sets.

task_completion.description: Assign the created material layer sets to the corresponding building elements (walls and slabs).
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D viewport or outliner showing walls or slabs selected, with the newly created material layer sets actively assigned to them in the Object/Material properties panel.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender file save dialog, export menu, or confirmation message showing the file being saved exactly as '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_envelope_spec.ifc'.

integrity.description: Material layer sets were genuinely created in the BIM software.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file to the correct new path rather than overwriting the original.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/thermal_envelope_spec.txt. The task requires creating exactly 2 material layer sets (for external walls and floor slabs) comprising exactly 8 layers and 8 distinct materials in total. The model contains 13 walls (8 external) and 4 slabs; the agent should assign the sets to the targeted elements (between 9 and 17 elements total). The final output must be saved to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_envelope_spec.ifc.
